money_flow_summary: Money flows from consumers through checkout systems to merchants. Payment processors take 2–3%, marketplaces 8–15%, logistics 10–25% of GMV. Solo entrepreneurs arbitrage across layers using automation.

opportunities.title: AI Product Listing Optimizer (Amazon/Etsy)
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Pull seller listings via Amazon SP-API, rewrite titles/bullets/descriptions with top-performing keywords, A/B test variants. Charge $99–$499/mo based on catalog size.
opportunities.moat: Performance data shows clear ROI; strong retention once listings convert better
opportunities.first_step: Apply for Amazon SP-API; build single-ASIN demo; post before/after in r/FulfillmentByAmazon
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: LLM writes Amazon-native copy that embeds high-volume search terms naturally — outperforming human copywriters who don't know A9

competitors.name: Helium 10 Listing Builder
competitors.weakness: Keyword research tool, not AI copy generator; $99–$249/mo just for the suite; generic templates

competitors.name: Jungle Scout Listing Builder
competitors.weakness: Manual process; no auto-upload; keyword suggestions only, no generated copy

competitors.name: Perpetua
competitors.weakness: Advertising automation only; no listing copy optimization

opportunities.gap: Helium 10 and Jungle Scout show you keywords but still require you to write the copy yourself. Zero tools auto-generate, auto-test, and auto-update listing copy based on conversion data.
poc_steps: Pick 3 Amazon products in the same category
Use Claude to rewrite their listing titles with the top-5 keywords from Helium 10 free tier
Show seller the before vs. after copy side by side
Offer 'I'll optimize 3 listings for $99' as manual service first to validate demand

opportunities.title: Shopify AI Customer Retention Suite
opportunities.how_money_is_made: AI analyzes purchase history, predicts churn, auto-triggers personalized win-back emails/SMS with dynamic product recommendations. Charge $199–$999/mo.
opportunities.moat: 12+ months purchase data creates accurate churn model; Shopify App Store distribution
opportunities.first_step: Build Shopify OAuth app; connect Klaviyo API for email; create churn prediction model
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI generates hyper-personalized win-back messages referencing specific past purchases

competitors.name: Klaviyo
competitors.weakness: Email platform, not AI retention; requires manual flows setup; $150–$800/mo; no churn prediction

competitors.name: Postscript
competitors.weakness: SMS only; no AI personalization; no predictive churn scoring

competitors.name: Retention.com
competitors.weakness: Only identifies abandoners; no personalized messaging; enterprise pricing

opportunities.gap: Klaviyo sends emails but doesn't tell you WHO is about to churn before they do. The predictive layer + auto-personalized outreach in one product is the gap.
poc_steps: Export a Shopify store's customer data (with permission)
Build simple RFM (Recency/Frequency/Monetary) churn score in Python/spreadsheet
Generate 3 personalized win-back email templates with Claude for top-at-risk customers
Show brand owner: 'here are 47 customers about to churn and their personalized emails'

opportunities.title: Amazon/Liquidation Return Pallet Arbitrage Tracker
opportunities.how_money_is_made: Monitor BULQ, Direct Liquidation, B-Stock for pallet manifests. LLM reads manifests, estimates resale value vs eBay sold listings, calculates margin. Use for yourself or sell as $49/mo SaaS.
opportunities.moat: eBay sold listing database creates proprietary pricing model over time
opportunities.first_step: Scrape eBay completed listings for 100 common liquidation categories; build manifest parser with LLM; test with 1 real pallet
opportunities.ai_agent_angle: AI reads messy manifest data and maps to accurate market values — 3+ hours work done in seconds

competitors.name: BULQ (built-in valuation)
competitors.weakness: Only shows BULQ listings, not cross-marketplace; basic valuation; no margin calculator

competitors.name: Liquidation.com
competitors.weakness: Raw auction platform; no intelligence layer; no profitability prediction

competitors.name: None
competitors.weakness: No dedicated tool exists for automated pallet valuation across all liquidation platforms

opportunities.gap: Liquidation resellers spend hours manually researching manifest items. A tool that auto-calculates expected profit before they bid doesn't exist.
poc_steps: Search each item on eBay manually, record sold prices
Build a spreadsheet template that calculates ROI
Automate with eBay API + Claude manifest parser
